title: Global Battery Storage Boom Is A Boon for Tesla
summary: Global battery storage installations are booming, and so is Tesla’s utility-scale battery business. title: Why Wet Coffee Grounds Might Be The Next Waste-To-Energy Goldmine
summary: A team of researchers at the Korea Institute of Geoscience and Mineral Resources (KIGAM) have just found a way to make biochar production faster and cheaper. title: UK regulator drops probe into ‘Essex Boys’ traders after they offer to pay £1mn to charity
summary: FCA concerned over possible collusion in group that reportedly made hundreds of millions of dollars betting on oil

title: Canada Building West’s First Grid-Scale SMR
summary: Construction has begun on the Western world’s first grid-scale Small Modular Reactor (SMR), though small is not what comes to mind, considering that the machine will fit on two soccer fields. title: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
summary: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.

title: Euro sinks to one-year low as falling oil prices ease pressure on ECB
summary: Traders back away from bets on further interest rate rises as economy slows
